author: jtraglia
content: Okay the person in charge of this is <@395677309719543812>! He'll be able to answer any questions.

author: moodmosaic
content: Yes -- we have a swarm that scans for issues and then another one that triages them. And for the triage we can choose between unit/integration tests and kurtosis pocs.

author: catwith1hat
content: <@395677309719543812> Very nice. Are the results publicly available, or locked in case something serious pops up? I'd be interested to compare notes.

author: moodmosaic
content: The results (and the prompts used to drive kurtosis) aren’t public. But the core infrastructure we currently use is public.
